<?php namespace Illuminate\Database\Schema; class MariaDbSchemaState extends MySqlSchemaState { /** * Load the given schema file into the database. * * @param string $path * @return void */ public function load($path) { $versionInfo = $this->detectClientVersion(); $command = 'mariadb '.$this->connectionString($versionInfo).' --database="${:LARAVEL_LOAD_DATABASE}" < "${:LARAVEL_LOAD_PATH}"'; $process = $this->makeProcess($command)->setTimeout(null); $process->mustRun(null, array_merge($this->baseVariables($this->connection->getConfig()), [ 'LARAVEL_LOAD_PATH' => $path, ])); } /** * Get the base dump command arguments for MariaDB as a string. * * @return string */ protected function baseDumpCommand() { $versionInfo = $this->detectClientVersion(); $command = 'mariadb-dump '.$this->connectionString($versionInfo).' --no-tablespaces --skip-add-locks --skip-comments --skip-set-charset --tz-utc'; return $command.' "${:LARAVEL_LOAD_DATABASE}"'; } }
